components.name: AIAnalysisPanel
components.purpose: Main drawer panel that displays AI analysis for a stock symbol. Acts as the primary container for the analysis UI.
key_features: Drawer component (400px width, right placement)
Fetches analysis data on open via aiAnalysisApi.getAnalysis()
Fetches market sentiment via aiAnalysisApi.getMarketSentiment()
Supports re-analysis via batchAnalyze and polling for status
Displays loading spinner during data fetch
Shows Empty state with '立即分析' button when no data

components.name: RecommendationCard
components.purpose: Displays AI trading recommendation with confidence score and multi-dimensional analysis scores
key_features: Shows recommendation tag: 买入/持有/卖出/观望 with color coding
Circular progress showing confidence (0-100%)
Risk level badge (高/中/低)
Four score progress bars: 技术面, 情绪面, 事件驱动, 新闻舆情
LLM insight text block at bottom

components.name: MarketSentimentBadge
key_features: Sentiment types: bullish (看涨), bearish (看跌), neutral (中性)
Icon + color badge format
Optional sector name prefix
Score percentage display

components.name: AIFactorsList
components.purpose: Displays key event-driven factors affecting the stock
key_features: List of EventSignal items (event_type, description, severity, date)
Event types: dividend, repurchase, forecast, announcement, lawsuit
Color-coded severity indicators (green positive, red negative, yellow neutral)
Expand/collapse for showing more than 5 items
Plus/Minus/Info icons based on severity

components.name: AIRecommendationModal
components.purpose: Modal wrapper for AIAnalysisPanel (currently placeholder, not actively used)
key_features: Modal wrapper with 420px width
Body style padding 16px
destroyOnClose cleanup
Contains inline AIAnalysisPanelContent (stub/placeholder)

components.name: index
components.purpose: Barrel export file for all AI analysis components
key_features: Exports: AIAnalysisPanel, RecommendationCard, MarketSentimentBadge, AIFactorsList, AIRecommendationModal

api_endpoints: POST /api/ai/batch-analysis - trigger batch analysis for symbols
flow_sequence: 1. Watchlist page clicks AI button -> sets aiAnalysisSymbol/Name, opens AIAnalysisPanel
2. AIAnalysisPanel opens with isOpen=true -> triggers useEffect
5. Data returned -> stores in analysis and marketSentiment state

current_layout.integration_point: Watchlist.tsx uses AIAnalysisPanel directly at bottom of page (not in a modal)

watchlist_page.handler: onClick sets symbol/name and opens panel

clarification_needs.question: Should AIRecommendationModal be used instead of Drawer for consistency with other modals?
clarification_needs.note: Currently AIRecommendationModal is a placeholder and AIAnalysisPanel uses Drawer directly

clarification_needs.question: Is there a need for real-time updates or auto-refresh of analysis data?
clarification_needs.note: Currently data is fetched once when panel opens

clarification_needs.question: Should the four score dimensions (技术面, 情绪面, 事件驱动, 新闻舆情) be displayed as horizontal bars or a different visualization?
clarification_needs.note: Currently using Progress bars from antd

clarification_needs.question: Should LLM insight be expandable if it's long?
clarification_needs.note: Currently displayed as a fixed-height block

clarification_needs.question: Is the 400px drawer width appropriate for the analysis content?
clarification_needs.note: Content may feel cramped with the score progress bars
